title: Cooling capacity correction factor for chilled water outlet temperature
summary: Cooling capacity correction factor varies with chilled water outlet temperature from 4В°C to 9В°C, with a factor of 1.0 at 7В°C and 3% per degree variation.

title: Cooling capacity correction factor for outdoor ambient temperature
summary: Cooling capacity correction factor varies with outdoor ambient temperature from 10В°C to 50В°C, with a factor of 1.0 at 35В°C.

title: Heating capacity correction factor for hot water outlet temperature
summary: Heating capacity correction factor varies with hot water outlet temperature from 40В°C to 55В°C, with a factor of 1.0 at 45В°C.

title: Heating capacity correction factor for outdoor ambient temperature
summary: Heating capacity correction factor varies with outdoor ambient temperature from -10В°C to 20В°C, with a factor of 1.0 at 7В°C.

title: Unit dimensions for MAC module chiller
summary: Dimensions for a MAC module chiller: length 1785 mm, width 912 mm, height 1820 mm.

title: Default cooling setpoint
summary: Default cooling setpoint is 12В°C.

title: Default heating setpoint
summary: Default heating setpoint is 40В°C.

title: Cooling mode setpoint range
summary: Cooling mode setpoint range is 4В°C to 15В°C.

title: Heating mode setpoint range
summary: Heating mode setpoint range is 26В°C to 60В°C.

title: Compressor start delay
summary: Compressor start delay is 3 minutes.

title: Minimum compressor off time
summary: Minimum compressor off time is 3 minutes.

title: Water pump start delay after compressor
summary: Water pump start delay after compressor is 30 seconds.

title: Foundation dimensions for MAC module chiller
summary: Foundation dimensions: length 1000 mm, width 350 mm, height 200 mm, with M10 anchor bolts.

title: Foundation dimensions for larger MAC module chiller
summary: Foundation dimensions: length 1030 mm, width 365 mm, height 200 mm, with M20 anchor bolts.

title: Water flow switch setting
summary: Water flow switch setting is 6.8 kPa.

title: Refrigerant type R22
summary: The unit uses R22 refrigerant.

title: Daily maintenance check items
summary: Daily maintenance includes checking water flow, water temperature, and refrigerant pressure.

title: High pressure fault
summary: High pressure fault is indicated by code E1.

title: Low pressure fault
summary: Low pressure fault is indicated by code E2.

title: Water flow fault
summary: Water flow fault is indicated by code E3.
